NOTE: Behavioral-only; one shared VERDICT labeler across C1-C4; C0 is the bare-word sigil control (claim_from_logits, B34 verbatim). 'Reasoning' = CoT-as-deployed (span+budget bundled); the content-vs-length separation is the OWED B37 length-matched filler control. n=30 paired, single agent/seed/greedy; McNemar power is in discordant pairs; interaction descriptive (underpowered). HEDGE != RESIST and HEDGE-in-either-cell pairs are excluded from each edge's discordant table.
